agent_description: RAG over the like-product performance library.
MILP + weighted scoring of SKU/channel options.
ML clustering / segmentation for launch timing & sequencing (Market Segmentation Agent).
Monte Carlo + like-product regression for the demand range & confidence interval.
Evidence-grounded portfolio recommendation (magic_prompt, anti-hallucination).
Planner approves the launch shortlist (Touchpoint 1).
Signal Capture Agent (SHARED with step 7) — ingests POS/orders/digital signals.
RAG over the like-product library for analogs.
ARIMA / XGBoost / prophet multi-level forecast (core of NPI Forecast Agent).
Demand Sensing Agent (SHARED with step 7) — refines the curve from live signals.
Writes the explainable multi-level demand-curve narrative (magic_prompt).
Planner approves/overrides the forecast (Touchpoint 1).
Pulls inventory/cost/service-level state from planning systems.
Newsvendor one-time-buy model balancing underage vs. overage cost.
Evidence-grounded optimal-quantity recommendation (magic_prompt).
Planner approves the optimized launch quantity (Touchpoint 1).
Publishes the approved target quantity to downstream planning systems (feeds step 4).
Pulls DC network state and current inventory positions.
Multi-echelon inventory optimization for pre-build sizing & DC positioning.
Allocates across customers/channels respecting commitment, priority, and safety-stock constraints.
Writes the pre-build + DC + allocation plan for sign-off (magic_prompt).
Planner approves the pre-build and DC plan (Touchpoint 1).
Auto-replenishes within the approved envelope.
Exception alerting tools — detects shortages, delays, demand spikes.
Scores and ranks exceptions by severity.
Generates the proposed next-best-action / resolution (magic_prompt).
Planner works the scored exception queue, accepts/overrides (Touchpoint 2).
